title: Simple Soundboard
description: Express yourself better with simple soundboard!
body:
### Resource Pack Required
[Player's Library](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/player-s-universal-resourcepack/)
### What does it do?
Simple Soundboard adds more sound into the game without the need of being in a call with the audience or voice chat mods.
### Just use a regular soundboard?
I made this cuz my laptop can't handle having a soundboard and the game both opened AT THE SAME TIME.
### Disclaimer
All sounds belong to their original owner. I own this datapack though.

### Credits
Jester Wind-up: Lethal Company
